feed.title: searat’s blog
feed.subtitle: A blog for answering the age-old question: "So… what do you do in your free time?"

entry.title: My first post!
entry.content:
This is my very first post. Yay!

The website is still under construction. I’ve added a Categories link where posts are grouped by category; and an Archive link where posts are grouped and sorted (newest first) by date. Both of which can be found on the top right navigation area of the website.

I’m also going to add a few more social links so if anyone is interested in reaching me elsewhere, they will have that option.

This post is categorized as “demo” since it doesn’t really contain anything other than meta-content. Hopefully I’m going to deliver a meaningful article soon!
entry.summary: This is my very first post. Yay!
